root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd') as day
,count((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type WHEN '21' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no WHEN '22' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no WHEN '42' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no END)) as c_count_mem ,coalesce(sum((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type WHEN '21' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount WHEN '22' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount WHEN '42' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount END)),0) as c_loan_approve_amount
,( select sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) from sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule where ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and (sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no) and (sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type in ('21','22','42')) and (sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0') and ((to_char( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,'yyyy'))::numeric) = '!year_1!' and ((to_char( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,'mm'))::numeric) = '!month_1!' ) as c_total_clr_sum
,coalesce(sum((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type WHEN '21' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve WHEN '22' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve WHEN '42' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve END)),0) as c_paid_amount
,count((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type WHEN '25' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no END)) as c_count_mem_25 ,coalesce(sum((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type WHEN '25' THEN sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount END)),0) as c_paid_amount_25
,'!year_1!' +543 as req_year ,pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name(('!month_1!')::int,'LT') as req_month_name FROM sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_com_m_branch ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type in ('21','22','42','25') /*WHERE*/ and ((to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'yyyy'))::numeric) = '!year_1!' and ((to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'mm'))::numeric) = '!month_1!' GROUP BY sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ASC

r_tge_loan_app_sum_nest.sql: SELECT sum(sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount) as c_total_clr FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type , sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = {0}) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) and (sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no = 'ส') and (sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no) and (sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type) /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ORDER BY sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date asc
